steps.title: Spot the cause-and-effect relationship
steps.content: The first sentence establishes that residents rely heavily on the Metro for millions of trips. The second sentence describes city officials maintaining the system. The transition must connect these by showing that the maintenance effort is the natural result of the heavy reliance.

steps.title: Match the signal to the choices
steps.content: Accordingly means 'for that reason' or 'as a result,' directly marking the consequence that officials maintain the system because residents depend on it heavily. The other three don't capture this consequence—they suggest exemplification, contrast, or choice instead. That matches choice B — B is correct.
